name: punchwall-depth-corridor
description: Validate the dense 75-layer shared excavation wall, closed side seams, two-character height, and authoritative rank HUD.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local blocks=root['Depth Blocks'] local corridor=root.Polish['Depth Corridor'] local first=blocks.DepthBlock_L001_C01_R01 local last=blocks.DepthBlock_L075_C12_R03 local dense=true for _,name in ipairs({'DepthBlock_L001_C01_R01','DepthBlock_L001_C12_R03','DepthBlock_L002_C01_R01','DepthBlock_L075_C12_R03'}) do local b=blocks:FindFirstChild(name) dense=dense and b~=nil and b.Size==Vector3.new(4,4,4) and b.Anchored and b.CanCollide end local left=corridor:FindFirstChild('Depth Corridor Side -27.5') local right=corridor:FindFirstChild('Depth Corridor Side 23.5') local seamClosed=left and right and math.abs((left.Position.X+left.Size.X/2)-(first.Position.X-first.Size.X/2))<.01 and math.abs((right.Position.X-right.Size.X/2)-(last.Position.X+last.Size.X/2))<.01 return H:JSONEncode({count=#blocks:GetChildren(),declared=root:GetAttribute('DepthBlockCount'),cube=root:GetAttribute('DepthBlockSize')==Vector3.new(4,4,4),dense=dense,height=last.Position.Y+last.Size.Y/2,longDepth=math.abs(last.Position.Z-first.Position.Z),sideWalls=left~=nil and right~=nil,seamClosed=seamClosed,floor=corridor:FindFirstChild('Depth Corridor Floor')~=nil})

steps.label: continuous multiplayer wall dimensions are correct

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,Depth=0,Coins=0,Score=0,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local beforePower=p.leaderstats.Power.Value local beforeCoins=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value local r=c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=1}) task.wait(.2) return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,broken=r.outcome=='broken',depth=p.leaderstats.Depth.Value,score=p.leaderstats.Score.Value,coinsRaised=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value>beforeCoins,powerUnchanged=p.leaderstats.Power.Value==beforePower})

steps.label: starter block opens and grants coins only

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local h=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local panel=h.DepthRankHUD local depth=h:FindFirstChild('DepthValue',true) return H:JSONEncode({visible=panel.Visible,title=panel.RankTitle.Text,stats=panel.RankStats.Text,topTitle=panel.LeaderboardTitle.Text,leaderboard=panel.Leaderboard1.Text,depthText=depth and depth.Text,cameraType=workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraType.Name,autoFocus=g:GetAttribute('CombatCameraActive')})

steps.label: rank and depth HUD use server state
